title: narcissus linnaeanus subsp. polyanthos
intro: Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. polyanthos, also known as the polyanthos narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its clusters of small, white, fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. polyanthos include its potential to help reduce anxiety and stress, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
